zh.Winchester Castle, Hampshire, England: 英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella of England於1214年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆時，她的父親John King of England48歲，母親Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England28歲。她於1235年7月20日與Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor在德國海藍-普法爾茲喬姆斯喬姆斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1241年12月1日在義大利普格利亞霍治亞享年27歲，埋葬在義大利普格利亞巴里安德里亞。

zh-hans.Winchester Castle, Hampshire, England: 英国英格兰哈普爾維古姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella of England于1214年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾維古姆时，她的父亲John King of England48岁，母亲Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England28岁。她于1235年7月20日与Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor在德国海藍-普法爾茲喬姆斯喬姆斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1241年12月1日在意大利普格利亞霍治亞享年27岁，埋葬在意大利普格利亞巴里安德里亞。

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella of England was born in 1214, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John King of England, was 48 and her mother, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, was 28. She married Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor on 20 July 1235, in Worms, Worms, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 1 December 1241, in Foggia, Puglia, Italy, at the age of 27, and was buried in Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella of England est née en 1214, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John King of England, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor le 20 juillet 1235, à Worms, Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 décembre 1241, à Foggia, Puglia, Italie, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italie.

de.Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Göppingen, Bade: Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Landkreis Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella of England 1214 in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John King of England 48 und ihre Mutter Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England 28. Sie hat am 20. Juli 1235 in Worms, Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Dezember 1241 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Foggia, Puglia, Italien und wurde in Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella of England è nata il nel 1214 nel Winchester, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John King of England, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor il 20 luglio 1235, nel Worms, Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 1 dicembre 1241, nel Foggia, Puglia, Italia, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolta a Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella of Englandが1214年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターで生まれた時，父John King of Englandは48歳，母Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of Englandは28歳であった。1235年7月20日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズウオルムズウオルムズでFrederick II Holy Roman Emperorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1241年12月1日にイタリアプウグリアフォグジアで27歳で死去し，イタリアプウグリアバーイアンドリアにて埋葬された。

ko.Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Göppingen, Bade: 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 그o핀겐 그o핀겐 호헨스타펜
ko.lifeSummary: Isabella of England(이)가 1214년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John King of England(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1235년 7월 20일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 워스 워스에서 Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 12월 1일 이탈리아 푸그리야 포지아에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 푸그리야 버리 앤드리아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella of England nasceu em 1214, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John King of England, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor em 20 de julho de 1235, em Worms, Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de dezembro de 1241, em Foggia, Puglia, Itália, com 27 anos, e foi sepultada em Andria, Bari, Puglia, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella of England родилась в 1214 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John King of England было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor 20 июля 1235 г. в местности вормс, вормс, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 1 декабря 1241 г. в местности фогя, пугля, Италия в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности андря, бари, пугля, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella of England nació en 1214, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John King of England, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Frederick II Holy Roman Emperor el 20 de julio de 1235, en Worms, Worms, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 1 de diciembre de 1241, en Foggia, Puglia, Italia, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultada en Andria, Bari, Puglia, Italia.
